title: AdBlue Software Modification — Mercedes-Benz C200
description: Software work on the engine control unit related to the AdBlue / SCR system. The ECU was identified, the original firmware was backed up, the software was modified and the control unit was safely programmed and verified after the operation.
image_alt: Mercedes C200 AdBlue SCR ECU software programming AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Mercedes-Benz C200 AdBlue / SCR software programming and ECU verification by AKEI Latvia.
